title: Property Consultant - Nexus Malls - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Nexus Malls - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
